title: Due date for all items

posts.author: Andressa (Andressa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is there a way to automate a due date for every item created for one board?
When an Item is created, set due date to sep 20 (example). So the due date will be set automatically, the same due date to every item on this board.

also,
every time a status is “x”, due date set to “specific date”, if status is ÿ", then due date is “specific date”.

Thank you!
